protocol: Toy Model 5G-M - Full SPARC run using uploaded Rotmod_LTG.zip
data_file: Rotmod_LTG.zip uploaded by user and staged locally

frozen_four.note: Frozen coefficients from the 5G-L four-galaxy baseline applied to all available galaxies.

train_groupkfold.note: Five-fold group holdout by galaxy using the frozen 5G-L feature set and ridge alpha=100.

status: Full 175-galaxy SPARC run completed. This is a strong diagnostic result, not physical validation.
